title: orchis × lucensis
intro: Orchis × lucensis, also known as the Lucensis orchid, is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross-breeding of Orchis mascula and Orchis italica. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Orchis × lucensis include its ability to soothe coughs, reduce inflammation, and improve respiratory function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or powder for herbal use, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
